Functions for managing and checking thread privilege states in a microcontroller environment.

# Purpose
This C header file manages thread privilege states for a microcontroller unit (MCU). It declares functions to check and set the privilege level of the current thread. The function [`mcu_state_is_thread_privileged`](<#mcu_state_is_thread_privileged>) checks if the thread is privileged, while [`mcu_state_set_thread_privilege`](<#mcu_state_set_thread_privilege>) updates the thread mode privilege bit in the control register, requiring the caller to be privileged when setting it to true. The file conditionally includes platform-specific implementations based on whether the code is compiled for an ARM architecture, using either `mcu/privilege_arm.inl.h` for ARM or `mcu/privilege_stubs.inl.h` for other architectures.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
- `mcu/privilege_arm.inl.h`
- `mcu/privilege_stubs.inl.h`
